empty.no_modules_title: Get started by activating a module
empty.no_modules_desc: Modules add KPIs, charts and analysis to your account. Choose your first from the library.
empty.no_data_title: Upload your data to get started
empty.no_data_desc: You have activated {{count}} module(s). Upload data to see KPIs, charts and alerts.
empty.no_widgets_desc: Your dashboard is empty. Add charts and KPIs from your modules using the pin button.

activation.title: Complete your store setup
activation.advisory_desc: Recommended configurations to improve your store
activation.degraded_desc: Your storefront is accessible but {{count}} critical configurations need attention
activation.ready_to_publish_desc: All configurations are in place. Publish your store to make it visible.

store_panel.title: Your store
store_panel.attention_urgent: {{urgent}} urgent out of {{total}} items to manage

first_live.title: Your store is online!
first_live.hint_storefront: You can open your storefront from the link above.
first_live.hint_orders: New orders will appear in the Orders section.
first_live.hint_manage: You can suspend or update your store at any time from Store Settings.

smart_setup.title: Store setup
smart_setup.publish_confirm: Publish your store and make it visible?

onboarding.title: Start here
onboarding.subtitle: From first login to your first retreat online — we'll walk you through.
onboarding.stripe_why: It's where your money lands: straight to your account, with deposits and balances handled automatically.
onboarding.store_why: The public address of your pages — with the profile as your About page.
onboarding.retreat_why: Title, category, dates, seats and deposit: the wizard guides you in 5 steps.
onboarding.publish_why: One click and it's bookable: it appears in your store AND in the retreats directory.
onboarding.profile_why: Photo, bio and socials on your public profile: more trust, more bookings.
onboarding.done_body: Your pages are alive. Here's where participants find you:
onboarding.done_next: From here on: deposits come in by themselves, balance reminders go out automatically, and orders live in Orders.
